The context monitor shows usage at 65%, which exceeds the 60% threshold. According to the skill, this triggers an alert to consider starting a new session. However, I should not automatically start a new session - I should notify the user first and let them decide.

Wait, looking at the context manager skill, it says "Automatically creates new session with loaded memory" at 85% threshold. The current 65% is above the 60% warning threshold but below the 85% automatic threshold.

Let me check the current session state and see if there are any other considerations. The user should be notified about this state.
